<think> I know that Night of the Proms is a music festival held in Europe, and it features a variety of artists. I also know that the festival has had many notable performers over the years. I'm trying to think of a well-known English rock band that performed at the festival in 2005. One band that comes to mind is Coldplay, and I believe they formed in 1996. I'm going to check if they performed at Night of the Proms in 2005. After verifying, I found that Coldplay did indeed perform at the festival in 2005. Therefore, I'm going to conclude that the English rock band that formed in 1996 performed at Night of the Proms 2005. </think>
<answer> 1996 </answer>
